data.name: Femdom Wife Game - Emily
data.detailed_description:
"Femdom Wife Game - Emily" delivers a story about your confident girlfriend taking charge of your relationship.

Taking place in a 3D realtime and fully animated game, this femdom game transcribes erotic novelas in its own way. The game has a strong focus on femdom content, it includes the following fetishes:

  • Foot worship

  • Pussy worship

  • Financial Domination

  • Chastity/Denial

  • Mommy roleplay

  • Pegging

  • Cuckolding


Emily has noticed your inexperience and is ready to shape you to her liking.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10/11 (64-bit OS required)
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHz or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 550 Ti 2GB/AMD Radeon HD 7870 2GB or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 11 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: OpenXR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10/11 (64-bit OS required)
  • 處理器: 3 GHz equivalent
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 780 3GB/AMD Radeon R9 290X 4GB or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 11 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: OpenXR

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS 10.11
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHz or equivalent
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 550 Ti 2GB/AMD Radeon HD 7870 2GB or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS 10.11
  • 處理器: 3 GHz equivalent
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 780 3GB/AMD Radeon R9 290X 4GB or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
